intents.text: What inputs does the proposed fix handle? Does it fix line breaks followed by slash?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: what inputs would that fix? line \n\n/?

intents.text: Can the fix be implemented in a much simpler way?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: can't this be done way simpler?

intents.text: Shouldn't we only trigger if the first character of the first line is a slash?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: we only want to trigger if the first char in the first line is /

intents.text: Implement the most concise and correct fix locally for testing.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: implement the most concise, correct fix locally then i test

intents.text: Does the fix still trigger on newlines before slash but prevent 'asf /' from triggering?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: this doesn't prevent \n\n/ from triggering, but it does if i do asf /

intents.text: Commit and push, then close the PR with a thank-you noting we implemented it manually more concisely.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: commit and push, close pr with a thank you and that we implementd this manually
